chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-3551 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on CMA No.19993/2023. 2. For order on CMA No.9753/2023. 3. For order on CMA No.8939/2023. 4. For order on office objection. 5. For hearing of CMA No.17874/2023. 6. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 02.04.2026 None present for the Petitioners. Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja, Advocate for Respondent No.3/K-Electric..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. None present on behalf of the petitioners, though specific direction was given to the petitioners as well as their counsel to appear and even a last chance was given to them, however, they are called absent without intimation. Perhaps they have lost interest in the matter; therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss this lis in default. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
